description: x2 150mmx150mm yellow hard plastic slow feeder x2 150mmx150mm black silicon lick mat 4 pieces connect like a jigsaw, great for fast eaters or for added enrichment. Put food in the black slow feeder sections and peanut butter or other pastes in the yellow lick mat sections. Suction cup base to keep it in place, even put the yellow lick mat on the wall for your dog to lick. You can separate the 4 pieces and spread them around your home for your dog to find for a bit of fun. Made from non-toxic, freezer safe material.

reviews.text:
Super impressed with Ace Dog Supplies!
My GSP normally inhales her dinner in about 60 seconds, even with a slow feeding bowl. I nearly gave up on lick mats, treat dispensers and puzzles, since she has always figured them out very quickly.
Well, I completely underestimated how good these products actually are!
I served her dinner using the Circle Bowl Lick Mat & the 4 Piece Lick Mat / Slow Feeder, she took nearly 40 minutes to finish, and even when done, she wanted to take it to take it to bed with her!
She also loves the Beef Liver treats & Peanut Butter Pumpkin Biscuits too!
reviews.author: Patsy
